title: 2024 Toyota Prius Prime 1/4 Mile Testing, Is It Really A VW Golf GTI 6-Speed Manual Competitor ???
description: Testing the new Prius Prime 1/4 mile times with a Dragy. This thing is quick for an econo-box!

items.name: You can measure the performance of your own vehicle and make amazing videos using the Dragy GPS Based Performance Meter and your phone
